## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeProcedure.render() method

Renders the procedure with the given context. Resolves task references to actual task content (not placeholders).

**Signature:**

```typescript
render(context: IRuntimeProcedureRenderContext): Result<IRuntimeRenderedProcedure>;
```

</td><td>

The render context with recipe and library access


</td></tr>

Result&lt;[IRuntimeRenderedProcedure](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimerenderedprocedure.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Success with rendered procedure, or Failure if rendering fails
